hypothesis: When Williams %R crosses above the overbought threshold of -80, it signals potential exhaustion of an uptrend. If this is confirmed by an increasing ATR (indicating volatility expansion) and a bullish Vortex signal (confirming a weak trend), it creates a high-probability mean-reversion setup. The strategy exploits the tendency of price to reverse after such confluence signals.

When Williams %R crosses above the overbought level (80) and ATR increases over 2 periods, it signals a potential reversal in momentum. Vortex confirmation of weak trend strengthens the mean-reversion signal, improving trade probability.
